notes: Solid asteroids implementation with proper wave progression, saucer, hyperspace, and extra lives, but asteroid/bullet velocities are frame-rate dependent (not dt-scaled) and the wave-clear condition incorrectly triggers during saucer presence checks causing minor logic issues.
An excellent, highly accurate implementation of Asteroids with great attention to detail, though movement is tied to frame rate rather than delta time.

Solid Asteroids clone with waves, saucer, hyperspace, scoring and lives, but movement is frame-rate dependent, pause/restart handling is slightly awkward, and some original-game polish/accuracy is missing.
